name: Boomerang
description: Single-user LAN backup appliance for websites (SFTP/RSYNC/FTP) and MySQL databases, with schedules, retention, off-site R2 mirror, and a web UI.

notes.text: LAN / internal use only. On first visit open http://<container-ip>:8080 and set the admin password.
Downloads the latest release from GitHub (supermaribo/boomerang). In-app updates work via Settings → Updates.
